title: Repurposed Structures - Tidbits Compat
description: Spawn Tidbit structures in RS Villages
body:
Add this datapack to the game to add compatibility between Repurposed Structures and Tidbits. The Tidbit buildings will spawn in RS's Overworld Villages and will include workstations that Tidbit uses for their villager professions. Now find that dance floor and groove!

 
- Tidbits mod can be obtained from here: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tidbits

- Repurposed Structures mod can be obtained from here: https://modrinth.com/mod/repurposed-structures-forge


![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/yLWkJy2N/images/988eb85b00c584c7164d3e97fa7f848b7c3b7390.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/yLWkJy2N/images/988eb85b00c584c7164d3e97fa7f848b7c3b7390.png)


**Note:** for people using CurseForge Launcher to download datapacks, use mods like Global Data & Resourcespacks to automatically load in downloaded datapacks without needing to manually move the datapacks from the resourcepack folder to the correct folders. 
https://modrinth.com/mod/globalpacks
